channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: ARC Raiders New Map Release Details—New Riven Tides Map Update, Explained
item.content:encoded:
ARC Raiders continues to evolve, and this means new maps and new locales to be eliminated in. If you’re counting down the days until ARC Raiders drops its next map in 2026, we’ve got everything you need to know so far about the Riven Tides update and the incoming map.

Since launch, the ARC community has invested thousands of hours exploring and pillaging the Dam Battlegrounds, the Buried City, The Spaceport, the Blue Gate, and Stella Montis. For many, they are like second homes. But there comes a time when you need to move on and look for other loot.

Say hello to the ARC Raiders Riven Tides update and its new map.

When is ARC Raiders New Map Coming Out? New Riven Tides Map Release

The new ARC Raiders map arrives in the April 2026 Riven Tides map update, and this is expected to be on April 28.

Embark hasn’t dropped an exact release date just yet, but using the dates from the 2026 ARC Raiders roadmap, we can form a pretty good guess as to when we think it’s dropping.

  • More Insider Gaming: ARC Raiders High Gain Antenna Project Guide

Check out the previous ARC Raiders monthly updates and when they landed.

Every monthly ARC update has the same thing in common: They all launched on the final Tuesday of the month.

Using this logic, it’s safe to assume that Riven Tides will follow the same pattern. So, you should look forward to Riven Tides dropping on April 28 (the final Tuesday of the month), and this is when the new map is coming!

Everything We Know About New ARC Raiders ‘Riven Tides’ Map

The new Riven Tides map isn’t necessarily going to be called Riven Tides, as this is what it’s been dubbed by the community, but promotional images suggest it will feature a strong coastal theme.

Firstly, every man and his dog is calling the new map ‘Riven Tides,’ and while this may end up being the case, it’s not 100% confirmed. However, Embark has generously released images of the new map, and it looks like the biggest, most beautiful, and potentially badass and butt-kicking map to date.

  • More Insider Gaming: Close Scrutiny Map Condition In ARC Raiders

There’s a lot of water, and its sprawling environment spans land and sea, and there’s a huge amount of verticality to it—maybe a cheeky long-distance Sniper shot from high above beckons?

The final March 2026 ARC Raiders update also added a major nod to the new map location.

Are you excited for the Riven Tides update? How is the new map looking compared to everything that’s come before it? Share your feedback and thoughts on the map and the future of ARC via the Insider Gaming Discord, where ARC Raiders conversations are happening all the time!

Check out even more ARC Raiders guides below:

  • How To Get Rare Canto SMG In ARC Raiders
  • How To Get Legendary Dolabra Shotgun In ARC Raiders
  • How To Get Vaporizer Regulator In ARC Raiders

MOBILE APP

item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Gray Zone Warfare Hits Highest Player Count Since Launch Following New Update
item.content:encoded:
Gray Zone Warfare’s long-awaited 0.4 update, Spearhead, is out now, and it’s proving to be a rampant success for MADFINGER Games. The early-access tactical shooter, which boasts a sumptuous open-world map and hundreds of tasks, has skyrocketed on Steam to a peak player count of 27,372 users, at the time of writing.

That’s not as high as the all-time peak of 72,548, but it is the most concurrent players the game has seen since May 20, 2024, a month after the game was released.

Spearhead Takes Gray Zone to New Heights

Gray Zone Warfare’s 0.4 update is nothing short of phenomenal, which is what we alluded to in our recent review of the game. It adds 100 new tasks, 25 new locations, all-new movement mechanics, weapons, and core game mechanics. There’s a fresh onboarding system, a graphical boost, and a massive optimization overhaul, all of which have brought players flooding into the platform.

That, combined with a hefty Steam sale and creator-backed marketing campaign, means that Gray Zone Warfare is storming up the charts on Steam once again.

MADFINGER Games has worked tirelessly to evolve Gray Zone Warfare, and it shows. How the game feels today compared to at launch in April 2024 is night and day. This latest update, Spearhead, is the single most important iteration of the open-world sandbox shooter to date.

It was even dubbed a ‘new game, new experience’ by the team at MADFINGER Games. The proof is in the pudding, as even the review sentiments around Gray Zone Warfare have soared in recent days.

Have you jumped back into Gray Zone Warfare, or are you playing it for the first time? Let us know what you think about 0.4 on the Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more Insider Gaming coverage, check out the news that Crimson Desert and Fortnite are collaborating

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant has been gaming for 30+ years and in the industry for 10+. You'll probably find him playing a post-apocalyptic game or an extraction shooter somewhere.

More from Grant Taylor-Hill

item.title: EXCLUSIVE: Veteran Studio Working On New Lord of the Rings Game
item.content:encoded:
A veteran studio is working on the new The Lord of the Rings game.

In October 2025, Insider Gaming exclusively reported that a new Lord of the Rings game was in development. This game, according to sources, was being backed by the Abu Dhabi Investment Office (ADIO) and was being designed in a way that it could “compete with Hogwarts Legacy”.

At the time of the report, it was understood that multiple parties were involved in the game, including Embracer and Revenge. There was also another studio working on the game, and Insider Gaming has learned which studio that is.

  • More News: Eidos Montreal To Lay Off 124 Employees

Recently, claims surfaced regarding Kingdom Come: Deliverance developer Warhorse Studios working on a The Lord of the Rings game. While sources say that it’s possible they are also working on one, they aren’t the studio working on this specific game.

According to those close to the game’s development, Tomb Raider developer Crystal Dynamics is working on the upcoming The Lord of the Rings game. This work is alongside what’s being done on the new Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis and Tomb Raider: Catalyst titles.

When asked for comment on both what Warhorse is working on and the Crystal Dynamics-developed game, Embracer reiterated that it does not comment on rumors or speculation. Crystal Dynamics also declined to comment.

As mentioned, the game being developed by Crystal Dynamics has received funding from the ADIO of roughly $100 million. The game has been in development for some time, but when asked regarding a release timeline, Insider Gaming was told it’s still “a bit away”.

What do you think of Crystal Dynamics developing a new The Lord of the Rings game? Leave your thoughts in the comments below, and in this official Insider Gaming Discord.

In other news, read about the release window for Lords of the Fallen 2 being accidentally revealed by an artist on the game. And for even more Insider Gaming delivered directly to your inbox, sign up for our newsletter.

Mike has been covering the gaming industry since 2012, and has reported on some of the largest events in the industry while also working as an investigative reporter. Outside of…

More from Mike Straw
